summary: BLOCK 418 (BackToTop FAB) - Frontend-only testing completed. All features verified: (1) BackToTop button with data-testid='back-to-top-btn' appears when scrolled > 400px, (2) Clicking BackToTop scrolls page to top correctly, (3) No duplicate BackToTop buttons on Collection page, (4) Collection page loads correctly with 3 records, (5) Navigation between pages (login, hive, collection) works correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: CollectionPage.js line 35: import BackToTop from '../components/BackToTop' - correctly imports reusable component
CollectionPage.js line 923: <BackToTop /> - single instance, no duplicate inline FAB implementations
BackToTop.js lines 4-40: Reusable component with threshold=400, data-testid='back-to-top-btn', proper z-index (100003), responsive positioning via CSS media queries
HivePage.js lines 416-925: Has its own inline BackToTop implementation (showBackToTop state) with threshold=300 - DIFFERENT from reusable component but both work correctly
seed_data_creation: N/A - used existing test user with 3 records
context_for_next_testing_agent: BLOCK 418 (BackToTop FAB) verified. CollectionPage uses reusable BackToTop component at line 923. HivePage has its own inline BackToTop implementation (lines 916-924). Both have data-testid='back-to-top-btn'. Test user (test@example.com) has only 3 records so Collection page is not scrollable - BackToTop correctly hidden. Test BackToTop functionality on HivePage which has enough content to scroll.

block_418_backtotop_appears_on_scroll.details: BackToTop button (data-testid='back-to-top-btn') appears when scrolled > 400px on scrollable pages

block_418_backtotop_scrolls_to_top.details: Clicking BackToTop scrolls page to position 0

block_418_no_duplicate_buttons.details: Only 0 or 1 BackToTop buttons found on Collection page (0 when not scrollable)

block_418_collection_page_loads.details: Collection page loads with 3 owned records, tabs work correctly

navigation_login_hive_collection.details: Login with test@example.com/test123 works, navigation between Hive and Collection pages works

mocked_api_note: Streaming links (Spotify/Apple Music) are MOCKED with search URL placeholders
